system_warranty.name: CertainTeed SureStart PLUS Extended Warranty
system_warranty.requirements: Installed by CertainTeed credentialed contractor + Integrity Roof System (full CertainTeed accessory bundle: WinterGuard, RoofRunner or DiamondDeck underlayment, SwiftStart starter, Shadow Ridge or Cedar Crest hip & ridge, Ridge Vent or similar)
system_warranty.tier_below: Standard Landmark Lifetime Limited Warranty — shingle only, no workmanship

documents.label: Landmark Shingles Technical Data Sheet (CertainTeed via BuildSite)

base_includes: Ice & water shield at eaves, valleys, and penetrations (CertainTeed WinterGuard)
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
base_excludes: Roof decking replacement — billed separately at $110/sheet (allowance)
Specialty siding repair under step flashing

items.description: Tear off existing composition shingles (1 layer) — dump fees included
CertainTeed RoofRunner Synthetic Underlayment — full coverage
CertainTeed WinterGuard Self-Adhering Waterproofing Shingle Underlayment — eaves, valleys, penetrations
Aluminum drip edge, color-matched — eaves and rakes
CertainTeed SwiftStart Starter Shingles — eaves and rakes
CertainTeed Landmark laminate shingles — installed. Lifetime warranty, 110 mph (130 with starter), StreakFighter algae. Includes waste.
items.notes: All-in billing line: $700/SQ × total roof area, waste included.

items.description: CertainTeed Shadow Ridge Hip & Ridge Shingles — color-matched
CertainTeed Ridge Vent — continuous along main ridge
New aluminum step flashing at wall-to-roof intersections
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
Contractor 10-year workmanship warranty (25-yr if SureStart PLUS Integrity Roof System certified)

add_ons.description: Sheathing replacement — 1/2" CDX plywood, per 4x8 sheet (32 SF)
add_ons.notes: Allowance — actual qty determined on tear-off.

add_ons.description: Tear off second (or additional) layer of composition shingles
add_ons.notes: Add per layer beyond single layer included.

add_ons.description: Tear off cedar shake / shingle roof
Upgrade shingle to Landmark PRO — 50 lb heavier per square, deeper shadow lines
add_ons.notes: Additive over base Landmark. Same warranty tier.

add_ons.description: Upgrade shingle to Landmark Premium — 300+ lb/SQ, premium aesthetic, NailTrak
add_ons.notes: Additive. Highest tier in the Landmark family.

add_ons.description: Upgrade hip & ridge to Cedar Crest — premium thicker profile
Lead pipe flashing UPGRADE in lieu of neoprene
Chimney flashing kit — 4-side reglet counter + step + apron

add_ons.notes: Code-required per IRC R1003.20 if chimney >30" wide upslope.

warranty_disclosure: To activate the CertainTeed SureStart PLUS Extended Warranty (with workmanship coverage), the installing contractor must be CertainTeed credentialed AND install the full Integrity Roof System bundled in this price: RoofRunner (or DiamondDeck) underlayment, WinterGuard ice & water, SwiftStart starter, Landmark shingles, Shadow Ridge hip & ridge, and Ridge Vent. Workmanship warranty term depends on contractor credential level.
